message.content:
Let me analyze the current state and what needs to be done for stage web-004-shared-nav. Current state: - site/index.html - has nav with link to page-2.html - site/page-2.html - has nav with links to index.html (Home) and page-3.html - site/page-3.html - has nav with link to page-2.html Stage goal: "Create webpage 4 and add shared navigation across all pages that includes pages 1 through 4." Validators: - shared-nav-all-pages: failure_class=shared_state - This means ALL pages (1, 2, 3, 4) should have the same shared navigation - page-4-links-page-3: failure_class=link_integrity - page-4 must link to page-3 So I need to: 1. Create site/page-4.html with shared navigation linking to all 4 pages 2. Update index.html, page-2.html, and page-3.html to have the same shared navigation (all 4 links) The shared navigation should include links to: - index.html (Home/Page 1) - page-2.html (Page 2) - page-3.html (Page 3) - page-4.html (Page 4) Let me create the files: page-4.html: - nav with links to all 4 pages - main content index.html update: - nav with links to all 4 pages (currently only has page-2.html) page-2.html update: - nav with links to all 4 pages (currently has index.html and page-3.html) page-3.html update: - nav with links to all 4 pages (currently only has page-2.html) Let me construct the JSON response. { "files": [ { "path": "site/page-4.html", "content": " Page 4
Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

Page 4

This is the fourth page.

" }, { "path": "site/index.html", "content": " My Website
Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

Welcome

This is the main content of the page.

" }, { "path": "site/page-2.html", "content": " Page 2
Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

Page 2

This is the second page.

" }, { "path": "site/page-3.html", "content": " Page 3
Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

Page 3

This is the third page.

" } ], "notes": "Created page-4.html and updated all pages (1-3) with shared navigation containing links to all 4 pages." }
